title: A Precarious Rest
lines: You wrap your legs tightly around the coarse hemp and close your eyes. The world is a silent, grey void, and you are a tiny speck suspended between the earth and the heavens.

The rope sways rhythmically, a slow, hypnotic motion that feels like the breathing of a colossal beast. You feel the vibration of the zeppelins above—a deep, metallic thrum that speaks of immense power and ancient machinery.
Your breath comes in ragged gasps, each one clouding in the freezing air, before being swallowed by the absolute silence of the heights.

options.desc: Tighten your grip and continue the ascent
